facebook.caption: POV: you walked Đường Trần Hưng Đạo looking for coffee and found the one locals actually return to. Tarapaca Cafe. 4.7 stars. 728 reviews. That's not luck, that's consistency. Order, sit down, slow the trip down for an hour. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Coffee cup hits the table at Tarapaca Cafe and suddenly the whole itinerary can wait. 4.7 stars on 728 reviews. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Khu Phố 7. Go find it.

instagram.caption: POV: you found the café locals keep coming back to. Tarapaca Cafe. 4.7★, 728 reviews. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: 728 reviews on a café in Phu Quoc. Watch what the hype is about. Tarapaca Cafe, Đường Trần Hưng Đạo.

tiktok.caption: Walked past twice. Third time I went in. Tarapaca Cafe delivered. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocCafe #VietnamTravel #CoffeeShop

video_script.hook: Walked past. Went back. Worth it.
